files.patch:
@@ -76,6 +76,9 @@ level = "info"   # debug|info|warn|error
 format = "text"  # text|json
 stdout = false   # also log to stdout (defaults to file-only)
 
+[daemon]
+stop_timeout_sec = 5     # wait for PID to clear on restart
+
 [metrics]
 enabled = false
 addr = "127.0.0.1:9317"

@@ -101,6 +101,9 @@ level = "info"   # debug|info|warn|error
 format = "text"  # text|json
 stdout = false   # also log to stdout when true
 
+[daemon]
+stop_timeout_sec = 5
+
 [metrics]
 enabled = false
 addr = "127.0.0.1:9317"
